name: Diagnose–Roadmap–Build–Operate
summary: Start to Scale's core four-phase approach that takes a growing company's finance function from informal to fully professional — and runs it until a permanent CFO takes over. Each phase delivers a concrete output before the next begins.

phases.name: Diagnose
phases.description: Read the books, the board pack, the cap table, and the conversations. Name what is actually broken — in plain Dutch. Deliver a quantified gap report and a 12-month roadmap to a professional finance function.

phases.name: Roadmap
phases.description: Sequenced 12-month plan from current state to professional finance function. Costed, dated, with a named owner per workstream. Every action on the roadmap is grounded in the diagnosis findings.

phases.name: Build
phases.description: Install the structure: monthly close, cash forecast, KPI dashboard, board reporting cadence, chart of accounts. Train the team that owns it after. Leave behind a finance operating system that works without the external adviser.

phases.name: Operate
phases.description: Run as fractional or interim CFO while the structure beds in. Board prep, capital decisions, investor communication, finance team mentoring. Hand over to a permanent CFO when scale demands it.

differentiators: Diagnosis before prescription — no roadmap without a named, evidenced diagnosis first
Hands-on operator, not just adviser — Start to Scale builds and runs the finance function until handover
Plain Dutch throughout — findings and advice in language the founder can act on
Structured handover — the output is a finance function the permanent team can own, not a dependency
